summary: A clip from a segment labeled THE DEEP DIVE about an ICE Homeland Security Investigations cyber center. It opens with a close-up of a circuit board being probed with a tool, then cuts to a seated interview with a man in a suit in a darkened studio. Lower-thirds read INSIDE LOOK AT C3'S WORK TO CATCH CHILD PREDATORS and INSIDE LOOK AT CENTER'S WORK TO CATCH CHILD PREDATORS, with a name caption for the interviewee.

script.scene: A close-up of a circuit board being probed with a tool; lower-third reads INSIDE LOOK AT C3'S WORK TO CATCH CHILD PREDATORS.
A man in a suit is interviewed in a darkened studio; a name caption appears.
The interview continues; lower-third reads INSIDE LOOK AT CENTER'S WORK TO CATCH CHILD PREDATORS.
